{{Infobox location
| name = Advocate prison
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocates]] have prisons.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocate prison]] is a location surveyed by Shyrax.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12">''The Engineer'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The food in an [[Advocate prison]] is made of replicated bricks.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c13">''The Engineer'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator fears being taken into the [[Advocate prison]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c48">''The Engineer'', chapter 48</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
